system.description: When you use your abilities to convince, threaten, or seduce someone into doing something, roll +Charm. If you are trying to use Convince! on a Contact in your Contact List, add the Contact's Rating.

failure.value: The target complies, but becomes immediately hostile.

partial.value: The target changes their agenda to your agenda, but either they need reassurance, payment, or coercion, or their compliance elicits suspicion from someone nearby (Director's choice).

success.value: The target changes their agenda to your agenda. If you haven't already taken a new Contact this Mystery, you may turn the target into a Contact with Rating +0. If this is an existing Contact, you may add +1 to their Rating (max +3).

critical.value: The target changes their agenda to your agenda. If you haven't already taken a new Contact this Mystery, you may turn the target into a Contact with Rating +1. If this is an existing Contact, you may add +2 to their Rating (max +3).
